name: Texas Red Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Red Chiles; Ground; To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 1-inch cubes.
2. Seed and chop the peppers.
3. Cook and stir beef, onion, and garlic in a 4-quart Dutch oven until beef is brown.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except cheese, tortillas, and beans.
5. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until beef is tender, about 2 hours.
7. Serve with cheese, tortillas, and beans.
